narrative:
Precinct Roaming Shores Village (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 1,225 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
